description_long: This object consists of two classic ring-shaped donuts placed side by side. One donut features a rich chocolate glaze with a smooth, glossy finish, while the other is topped with a thick, white icing that appears slightly textured and drippy. Both donuts have a soft, cake-like base with a light tan color visible beneath the icing. The chocolate-glazed donut has a more uniform, shiny surface, while the white-iced donut displays a more irregular, almost frosted appearance. There are no visible toppings such as sprinkles or nuts on either donut. The donuts are unwrapped and appear to be simply placed together, likely intended for display or immediate consumption.
description: A pair of ring-shaped donuts, one with glossy chocolate glaze and the other with thick, textured white icing, both with a soft tan base and no visible toppings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white-iced donut in front and the chocolate-glazed donut behind, highlighting the thick, drippy white icing and the smooth chocolate glaze.
description_view_1: Side-by-side view with the white-iced donut on the left and the chocolate-glazed donut on the right, clearly displaying the contrast between the two icing types.
description_view_2: Rear view with the chocolate-glazed donut in front and the white-iced donut behind, emphasizing the glossy chocolate surface and the textured white icing.
description_view_3: Side-by-side view with the chocolate-glazed donut on the left and the white-iced donut on the right, showing the tan base and the icing coverage on both donuts.
attribute_icing_type: One donut has a glossy chocolate glaze, the other has a thick, textured white sugar icing.
attribute_placement_location: unwrapped, placed together on a flat surface
